title: World

items.title: Italian toddler dies after transplant with heart 'burned by frostbite'
items.description: The heart given to two-year-old Domenico was reportedly severely damaged during its transfer to hospital.

items.title: Third man arrested after teens die at holiday park
items.description: Ethan Slater, 17, and Cherish Bean, 15, died at a holiday park near Bridlington on Wednesday.

items.description: Troops should be deployed to peaceful parts of the country in non-fighting roles, he said.

items.description: A cross-party committee will also look into the appointment and accountability of UK trade envoys.

items.title: Israeli strikes kill at least 10 in Lebanon, officials say
items.description: The strikes are among the deadliest in Lebanon since a ceasefire ended the war between Israel and Hezbollah.
